json_data.title: Preparation for the Major
json_data.description: Select one course from the following or demonstrate equivalent proficiency:

options.title: Intermediate Russian
courses: RUSSN 6 - Intermediate Russian
RUSSN 20 - Intensive Intermediate Russian

options.title: Elective
courses: RUSSN 25 - Great Russian Novel
RUSSN 25W - Great Russian Novel
RUSSN 90A - Introduction to Russian Civilization
RUSSN 90B - Russian Civilization in 20th Century
RUSSN 90BW - Russian Civilization in 20th Century
